eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Potter; Randall, TX; at 3:58 PM on JUN 23, 2026 Effective until 4:58 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: EXTREME WEATHER HAS BEEN REPORTED IN YOUR AREA, INCLUDING A TORNADO WARNING, HEAVY RAIN, AND LARGE DAMAGING HAIL POSSIBLE. SEEK SHELTER NOW. GET INSIDE, STAY INSIDE, STAY TUNED
